zh.Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭度福利爾桑哈爾
zh.Canongate, Midlothian, Scotland: 蘇格蘭米德洛迪安卡農蓋特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Patrick Wilsone於1515年出生在蘇格蘭艾丁波時，他的父親John Wilson29歲，母親Jonet Leyis24歲。他和Katharine Majorbankis至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1568年1月10日在蘇格蘭度福利爾桑哈爾享年53歲。

zh-hans.Canongate, Midlothian, Scotland: 苏格兰米德洛迪安卡農蓋特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Patrick Wilsone于1515年出生在苏格兰艾丁波时，他的父亲John Wilson29岁，母亲Jonet Leyis24岁。他和Katharine Majorbankis至少有5个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1568年1月10日在苏格兰度福利爾桑哈爾享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wilsone
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Will + patronymic -son ‘son of Will’. Will was a very common medieval short form of William . This surname is also very common among African Americans.

variants.name: Will
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Will, a short form of William . This surname is now commonly found in Scotland, in Aberdeenshire, Angus, and Kincardineshire.

English: topographic name for someone who lived by a spring or stream, from Middle English wel, wel(l)e, wille, in a southwestern dialect form. This surname is found predominantly in the south and southwestern parts of the country. Compare Well 1.
English: nickname from Middle English iwil, wil(l)e ‘agreeable, pleasing’.

nameMeanings.name: Patrick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Name of the apostle and patron saint of Ireland ( c.389–461 ), Gaelic Pádraig. He was a Christian Briton and a Roman citizen, who as a young man was captured and enslaved by raiders from Ireland. He escaped and went to Gaul before returning home to Britain. In about 419 he felt a call to do missionary work in Ireland. He studied for twelve years at Auxerre, and in 432 returned to Ireland. For the rest of his life it is difficult to distinguish fact from fiction. He apparently went to the court of the high kings at Tara and made some converts there; then he travelled around Ireland making further converts until about 445 , when he established his archiepiscopal see at Armagh. By the time of his death almost the whole of Ireland is said to have been converted to Christianity. He is also credited with codifying the laws of Ireland. In his Latin autobiography, as well as in later tradition, his name appears as Patricius ‘patrician’ (i.e. belonging to the Roman senatorial or noble class), but this may actually represent a Latinized form of some lost Celtic (British) name. In Ireland in particular, it has been one of the most enduringly popular boys' names.

en.lifeSummary: When Patrick Wilsone was born in 1515, in Edinburgh, Scotland, his father, John Wilson, was 29 and his mother, Jonet Leyis, was 24. He had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Katharine Majorbankis. He died on 10 January 1568, in Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Patrick Wilsone est né en 1515, à Edinburgh, Écosse, son père, John Wilson, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Jonet Leyis, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec Katharine Majorbankis. Il est décédé le 10 janvier 1568, à Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Patrick Wilsone 1515 in Edinburgh, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Wilson 29 und seine Mutter Jonet Leyis 24. Er hatte mit Katharine Majorbankis mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 10. Januar 1568 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Patrick Wilsone è nato il nel 1515 nel Edinburgh, Scotland, il suo padre, John Wilson, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Jonet Leyis, aveva 24 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con Katharine Majorbankis. Morì il 10 gennaio 1568, nel Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Patrick Wilsoneが1515年にスコットランドエディンブルグで生まれた時，父John Wilsonは29歳，母Jonet Leyisは24歳であった。彼はKatharine Majorbankisとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1568年1月10日にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアサンクハーで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Patrick Wilsone(이)가 1515년 스컷랜드 에딘버그h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Wilson(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Jonet Leyis(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Katharine Majorbankis(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1568년 1월 10일 스컷랜드 드프리실르 산크하르에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Patrick Wilsone nasceu em 1515, em Edinburgh, Scotland, seu pai, John Wilson, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Jonet Leyis, tinha 24 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha com Katharine Majorbankis. Ele faleceu em 10 de janeiro de 1568, em Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Patrick Wilsone родился в 1515 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия, его отцу по имени John Wilson было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Jonet Leyis, 24. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от Katharine Majorbankis. Он умер 10 января 1568 г. в местности санкухар, думфриессхир, Шотландия в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Patrick Wilsone nació en 1515, en Edinburgh, Scotland, su papá, John Wilson, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Jonet Leyis, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija con Katharine Majorbankis. Murió el 10 de enero de 1568, en Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, a la edad de 53 años.
